message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Consensus already achieved — commit and push now">
Great additions! We already had 9/9 consensus before these changes, and these are purely additive improvements aligned with the acceptance criteria. No need for another full review round — commit and push now.

1. git add all changed/new files plus .claude-sessions/
2. git commit — message about Navigation + Dashboard skeleton (Step 1 of GTD implementation)
3. git push
4. gh run list --limit 1

Commit now.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The commit and push were already completed in my previous response. Let me verify the current state.
